text: List of deaths. Ganon exploded, Morshu and Militron were burnt or exploded, Gay Luigi trips on spaghetti, Fat Mario gets impaled by knifes, Impa gets hit by a shield and impaled by a sword, Fari falls a great distance, Duke Onkled gets hit by a poisonous oktorok ball and possibly died during the fall if not already dead, Zelda gets pressed into the sword that killed Impa, Gwonam falls a great distance, King Harkinian gets crushed by a chandelier, Link explodes, gets burnt, or crushed in it.
